claimText: Salkhan Fossil Park is located in the Kaimur Range, which is part of the Vindhya range in Uttar Pradesh.
evidenceExcerpt: Location: Kaimur Range (part of Vindhya range), adjacent to Kaimur Wildlife Sanctuary... Sonbhadra, Uttar Pradesh
examUse: Correct-pair question matching fossil parks to their respective states or mountain ranges.

claimText: Salkhan Fossil Park features approximately 1.4 billion-year-old Stromatolite fossils created by communities of cyanobacteria.
evidenceExcerpt: Site's fossil assemblage features Stromatolites created by communities of cyanobacteria... fossils dating ~1.4 billion years
examUse: Statement-based question on the type and age of fossils found at Salkhan Fossil Park.
distractorHooks: Fossils dating to the Jurassic period

claimText: The fossilized microbial structures at Salkhan Fossil Park record the Great Oxidation Event.
evidenceExcerpt: Site's fossil assemblage features Stromatolites... record Great Oxidation Event.
examUse: Statement-based question linking specific geological sites in India to major Earth history events.

claimText: Salkhan Fossil Park has been added to the UNESCO Tentative List for World Heritage Sites.
evidenceExcerpt: Salkhan Fossil Park added to UNESCO Tentative List For World Heritage Sites
examUse: Current affairs or statement-based question regarding recent additions to India's UNESCO Tentative List.
distractorHooks: Recognized as a finalized UNESCO World Heritage Site
